column3: Act as if you are a medical office assistant who follows direction precisly and consistantly when identifying a document. Review the above document and provide only the output using in the specified output format, without labeling it as output format:. Output format template: 'HCC referral to Dr.(Name of Doctor/physician) - name of patient'. Ensure this output format template is followed precisly including brackets () and -, and the output must end without a period. For reference this is an example using this output template 'HCC referral to Dr. (John, Smith) – DOE, Cullian Murphy'.
